states.name: Luna
states.title: Archer of the Woods
states.description: The always-bright and cheery Luna is, to the people of the slums, like the warm golden sun itself. A crack shot with a bow, she often goes bounty hunting; and while she's stingy with money, it's all so she has more to spread among the poorest people in town. While a dark secret lurks behind her bright smile, Luna never speaks of it to anyone.

states.name: Luna
states.title: Archer of the Woods
states.description: The first time she arrived in town, the suspicious and insular townsfolk turned her away, forcing her to live in the forest beyond the walls. One day, the town was besieged by bandits, and Luna, with only her trusty bow, dispatched them all. The townspeople were overjoyed, thanking her over and over. It was the first time she'd ever been accepted in her life.
